channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Asbestos roof tile and a partition fold out, 19th April
item.description:
Asbestos isn't great for health so I'm not sure but I think it should be removed and the partition has been dumped there too

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Haddon Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped waste, loud fridges, 19th April
item.description:
At the rear of havat they have two large loud fridges, are these allowed was planning granted? There is also waste being dumped by businesses here. The whole area looks disgusting! Pictures attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walters Yard, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign twisted, 19th April
item.description:
Sign on street light outside 113
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is collapsing, 19th April
item.description:
A drain next to my house is collapsing and there is water coming up from the drains that are connected to the toilets on my road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signs twisted, 19th April
item.description:
Signs on street light are twisted

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Homesdale Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish still there, 19th April
item.description:
I reported this yesterday, rubbish is everywhere, none of it is cleared and soon the street will be covered in it. The council have said the case is resolved but nothing is cleared away?! Still a trip hazard on the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135, Trafalgar Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tv dumped on the pavement, 19th April
item.description:
This spot is very frequently used for dumping items.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lampard Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items left on street, 19th April
item.description:
Items (including mattress) left on the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Great Elms Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of clothes, 19th April
item.description:
Bags of clothes and general rubbish dumped in Linton close again happening every week now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lovel Avenue, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvington Park Car Park - Rubbish Dumped., 19th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped at the recycling centre and blowing all round the car park. Can this please be cleared up and some enforcement action done to stop this happening everyday?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 19th April
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pritchards Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 19th April
item.description:
Dawson Hill Dunstan’s Rd SE22 Please investigate with address.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 174, Dunstan's Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 19th April
item.description:
Dawson Hill Dunstan’s Rd SE22 Please investigate with address.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 174, Dunstan's Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car boot part and bin, 19th April
item.description:
Large abandoned bin and car boot cover blocking pavement. Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Glengarry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish fly tipped next to bin, 19th April
item.description:
Rubbish often being left by local household and foxes get it and result is open rubbish all over pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 115, Crofton Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are 2 lots of graffiti on the glass of this shelter located on Shooters Hill towards Black, 19th April
item.description:
There are 2 lots of graffiti on the glass of this shelter. It has been there about a couple of weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shooters Hill, Shooters Hill, Woolwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Pond overgrown with weed, 19th April
item.description:
Needs skimming off and oxygenation constantly. This pond is never free from such floating weeds.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bridge, 19th April
item.description:
Graffiti has appeared on both sides of Vanbrugh Hill bridge over the southeastern Trainline. The pink one is on the right side if you were facing Trafalgar Road and the black one is on the left side. It’s been there for at least a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodlands Park Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 19th April
item.description:
Litter and illegal drug canisters all along side of pavement the whole way down the road. Has not had a weekly cleanse

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harmony Place, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in road, 19th April
item.description:
Edge of road full of litter. Has not had a weekly cleanse

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harmony Place, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet
